art_news: Global art market grew 4% to $59.6 billion in 2025; renewed focus on in-person channels and local collectors in 2026.
market_context: Cautious optimism with 43% of dealers expecting improvement; U.S. leads with 44% market share.

art_news: Global art market grew 4% to $59.6 billion; US leads 44%; Middle East rising for 2026.
market_context: Cautious optimism; shift to experience-based luxury and transvertical market assets.

summary: Global art market grew 4% to $59.6 billion; strong recovery in 2025 led by high-end; cautious optimism for 2026.
Art market grew 4% to $59.6 billion, driven by younger collectors; continued cautious optimism.
